description: P2 Quality fix: Replace InlinePromptArchitect.SYSTEM_PROMPT with the full detailed version from LTX2EasyPromptLD.py (the canonical source)
steps: Step 1: Read the full SYSTEM_PROMPT from LTX2EasyPromptLD.py (lines 164-201). It is a triple-quoted string starting with 'You are a cinematic prompt writer for LTX-2...' and ending with '...Begin immediately with the video style or shot description.'

Step 2: In LTX_PRO.py, replace the InlinePromptArchitect.SYSTEM_PROMPT (lines 452-474) - which is currently a parenthesized string concatenation - with the full triple-quoted version from LTX2EasyPromptLD.py. The full version includes: PRIORITY ORDER with detailed character description rules, UNDRESSING RULE, camera movement as prose rules, audio/dialogue prose rules, WRITING RULES, and IMPORTANT output rules. Keep the class attribute assignment format: 'SYSTEM_PROMPT = """...(full content)..."""'
acceptance_criteria: InlinePromptArchitect.SYSTEM_PROMPT contains 'UNDRESSING RULE' (a key section from the full prompt)
InlinePromptArchitect.SYSTEM_PROMPT contains 'Begin immediately with the video style or shot description.' (the final line)
InlinePromptArchitect.SYSTEM_PROMPT contains 'DIALOGUE INSTRUCTION' (another key section from full prompt)
